hero.subtitle: The all-in-one learning platform for mortgage brokers: learn, certify, and grow your career.

recognized.title: Bank-recognized certificates
recognized.description: Earn a certificate accepted by banks, agencies, and mortgage institutions.

createdByProfessionals.title: Created by mortgage professionals
createdByProfessionals.description: Courses built by expert mortgage brokers with real-world scenarios.

learning.title: Learn anytime
learning.description: Learn anytime, anywhere with 24/7 access to all materials.

liveSupport.title: Live support & guidance
liveSupport.description: Get live chat, technical help, and mentor advice throughout your journey.

blocks.title: Assessment Block
blocks.description: Gain a solid foundation: regulations, valuation, documentation. Required to unlock further modules.

blocks.title: Professional Block
blocks.description: Complex scenarios, multi-property strategy, and real client cases — for expert-level brokers.

blocks.title: Expert Block
blocks.description: Pick specific modules to deepen your expertise. Pay only for what you need.

createAccount.title: Create Account
createAccount.description: Sign up in just a few clicks to access your personalized learning dashboard.

chooseBlock.title: Choose a block
chooseBlock.description: Browse our course blocks and select the one that matches your current level and goals

startLearning.title: Start learning instantly
startLearning.description: Get immediate access to lessons, materials, and progress tracking — no delays

luca.name: Luca Meier
luca.title: Independent Mortgage Broker
luca.quote: The Learning World platform gave me exactly what I needed — up-to-date regulations, practical tools, and client-ready templates. The Assessment Block helped refresh my fundamentals in a structured way.

anna.name: Anna Schneider
anna.title: Junior Broker at Raiffeisen Bank
anna.quote: As someone new to the industry, the modular approach made it easy to learn step-by-step. The Advanced modules gave me real confidence when discussing investment financing with clients.

daniel.name: Daniel Frei
daniel.title: Partnered Broker for UBS clients
daniel.quote: The professional-level courses helped me deepen my understanding of SARON trends and build smarter financing strategies. I appreciated the Swiss-specific focus of each module.

contactUs.text: Steigen Sie jetzt in die S.O.I. Lernwelt ein und bringen Sie Ihre Beratungskompetenz aufs nächste Level.

signup.label: Sign Up
signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.paragraph: Make a difference – create an account now and get started!

successfulSignup.title: Account created successfully!
successfulSignup.paragraph: Glad to have you on board! Your professional growth starts here.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Your Password
forgotPassword.paragraph: Enter your login email address to receive a link to reset your password.

assessment.title: Assessment Block
assessment.description: Provides a focused overview of the mortgage market, including property valuation, regulatory requirements, and affordability calculations. It also covers refinancing and new financing processes, along with access to the 'Chamäleon - H' platform and necessary documentation.

professional.title: Professional Block
professional.description: Offer in-depth knowledge on specialized real estate topics such as investment properties, multi-family houses, renovations, and financing. Additional subjects include land acquisition, pledging, pension funds, and key elements of purchase agreements.

expert.title: Expert Block
expert.description: Offers advanced knowledge in property valuation, building rights, and commercial real estate financing. It covers mortgage models, loan structuring, legal frameworks, and tax implications such as usufruct, debt certificates, and property gains tax.

ProfilePage.title: My Profile
ProfilePage.description: Here you can view or edit your profile information

professionalInformation.title: Professional Information
professionalInformation.description: Details about your career and qualifications

cv.description: Your CV must be a .doc, .pdf, .docx, and not bigger than 1MB
